Noah (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $101,200,044Details
International Box Office $251,631,021
Worldwide Box Office $352,831,065
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $12,420,882
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $9,837,656
Total $22,258,538
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the film inspired by the story of courage, sacrifice and hope.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$43,720,472 (43.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.31 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:28.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$130,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,567 opening theaters/3,571 max. theaters, 4.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $148,145,961

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 28th, 2014 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures

Running Time: 137 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Digital Cinematography, Intertitle, Prologue, Visual Effects

Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
